parameters.query:
SELECT wp.id AS plan_id, wp.status, wp.theme_name, wp.theme_seed,
  a.id AS asset_id,
  CASE
    WHEN a.template_name IN ('Multi Item', 'Single Item Spotlight', 'Educational') THEN 'video'
    WHEN a.template_name = 'Image Ad' THEN 'image'
    WHEN a.template_name = 'Carousel Ad' THEN 'carousel'
    ELSE 'other'
  END AS asset_type,
  CASE
    WHEN a.template_name = 'Multi Item' THEN 'multi_item'
    WHEN a.template_name = 'Single Item Spotlight' THEN 'spotlight'
    WHEN a.template_name = 'Educational' THEN 'educational'
    WHEN a.template_name = 'Image Ad' THEN 'image_ad'
    WHEN a.template_name = 'Carousel Ad' THEN 'carousel_ad'
    ELSE lower(replace(a.template_name, ' ', '_'))
  END AS template_type,
  a.target_placements AS placements,
  a.planned_outputs,
  a.title AS asset_theme,
  a.inventory_items AS items,
  a.script_text,
  c.name AS client_name, c.id AS client_id, c.slug AS client_slug,
  COALESCE((SELECT json_object_agg(cp.pronunciation, cp.word) FROM client_pronunciations cp WHERE cp.client_id = c.id), '{}'::json) AS pronunciation_reverse_map
FROM weekly_plans wp
JOIN assets a ON a.plan_id = wp.id AND a.included = true
JOIN clients c ON c.id = wp.client_id
WHERE wp.id = '{{ $json.body.plan_id }}'::uuid

UPDATE weekly_plans
SET status = 'approved', updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.plan_id }}'::uuid
  AND status IN ('confirmed', 'draft')

parameters.jsCode:
// Build platform copy payload for non-video assets (image, carousel)
const loopItem = $('Loop Over Assets').first().json;

return [{ json: {
  asset_id: loopItem.asset_id,
  asset_type: loopItem.asset_type,
  template_type: loopItem.template_type,
  is_video: false,
  platforms: loopItem.platforms,
  theme_name: loopItem.theme_name,
  client_id: loopItem.client_id,
  plan_id: loopItem.plan_id,
  client_name: loopItem.client_name,
  _script_text: '',
  _script_success: true,
  _copy_payload: {
    client_id: loopItem.client_id,
    platforms: loopItem.platforms,
    content_type: 'ad',
    format: loopItem.asset_type,
    template_type: loopItem.template_type || '',
    theme: loopItem.theme_name,
    vehicles: [],
    script: '',
    plan_asset_id: loopItem.asset_id,
    store_copy: false
  }
}}];
